title: tanacetum myconis
intro: Tanacetum myconis, also known as Pyrethrum, is a flowering plant species from the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum myconis include its use in treating fever, headaches, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Tanacetum myconis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used topically in the form of creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
